_comment: COMMITTED DEFAULT admin tool registry (no secrets — policy + env var NAMES + optional MCP launch only). The server's credential resolver loads this, then overlays the dashboard-written orchestrator.mcp.json (gitignored) when present. Shared-tool keys are supplied via the server's environment (e.g. DATAFORSEO_USERNAME/PASSWORD on Railway) or the system .env; client-owned keys come from each client's uploaded .env. Edit policies here for the prod default; the dashboard can override per deployment.
